title: rubus caroli
intro: Rubus caroli is a species of raspberry native to China, characterized by its small, edible fruits and delicate foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus caroli are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Rubus caroli can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
